name: MECONIUM PERITONITIS
definition: sterile chemical peritonitis ← perforation of bowel proximal to high-grade / complete intense chemical reaction of peritoneum, which seals off the perforation

demographics.Age: antenatal perforation after 3rd month of gestation

dominant_finding: "snowstorm appearance" = highly echogenic material throughout abdomen in between
distribution: larger aggregates of calcifications along inferior surface of liver / flank / processus
discriminating_features: calcific plaques scattered throughout peritoneal cavity
